revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月4日'''（きゅうれきくがつよっか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[応保]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1161年]][[9月24日]]） - [[天然痘]]の流行のため[[永暦]]より応保に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1702年]][[10月24日]]） - [[横井也有]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1783年]]） * [[寛保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1742年]][[10月2日]]） - [[荒木田経雅]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1805年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}
[[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]]

<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September4-->きゅうれきくがつよっか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[応保]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1161年]][[9月24日]]） - [[天然痘]]の流行のため[[永暦]]より応保に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[元禄]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1702年]][[10月24日]]） - [[横井也有]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1783年]]） * [[寛保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1742年]][[10月2日]]） - [[荒木田経雅]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1805年]]）
== Deaths == * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[10月1日]]） - [[小山良師]]、[[赤穂藩]][[足軽大将|足軽頭]]（* [[1648年]]） * [[享保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[10月13日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1648年]]） * [[文政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1820年]][[10月10日]]） - [[浦上玉堂]]、文人画家（* [[1745年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}

[[sn:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}}） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|永暦}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}}） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}}, a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}}） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}}, an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}}, a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}

[[sn:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}}） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|永暦}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}15年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}}） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}}, a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}}） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}}, an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}}, a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}}).

[[sn:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}}） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|永暦}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}}15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}}, a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}}） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}}, a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}}） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}}, an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}}, a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}}).

[[sn:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|永暦}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}

[[sn:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}} ). == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有|12=draft|12=draft}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=draft|12=draft}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=draft|12=draft}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1161|ja|1161|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 24|ja|9月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1702|ja|1702|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayuu|ja|横井也有|12=draft|12=draft}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kanpo|ja|寛保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1742|ja|1742|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=draft|12=draft}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1715|ja|1715|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 1|ja|10月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=draft|12=draft}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1722|ja|1722|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motoki|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1820|ja|1820|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Urakami Gyokudō|ja|浦上玉堂|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904}}
{{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初四}} {{zh:九月初四}}
{{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初四}} {{zh:九月初四}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初四}} {{zh:九月初四}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar September]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:September 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 4일]] [[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月初四]] [[en:draft:September 4 (Lunisolar)]]

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 4|qq=September 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1161|ja|1161|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1161|qq=}} [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|qq=}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1702|ja|1702|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1702|qq=}} [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1783|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1742|ja|1742|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1742|qq=}} [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|qq=}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1805|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=}} [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|qq=}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1648|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1722|ja|1722|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1722|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1648|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1820|ja|1820|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1820|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1745|qq=}} ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1715|ja|1715|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1715|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|qq=}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1648|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1722|ja|1722|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1722|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|ja|1648|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1648|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1820|ja|1820|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1820|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|ja|1745|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1745|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 4|qq=September 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|ja|1783|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1783|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|qq=}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|ja|1805|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1805|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|qq=}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1820|ja|1820|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1820|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|September 4|qq=September 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|qq=}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|qq=}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|qq=|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|qq=|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初四]][[zh:九月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840145]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 4|qq=September 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1161|1161]] [[:en:September 24|September 24]] ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1702|1702]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Yokoi Yayū|Yokoi Yayuu]] , a haiku poet († [[:en:1783|1783]] ). * [[:en:Kanpō|Kanpo]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1742|1742]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]] ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († [[:en:1805|1805]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:October 1|October 1]] ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1722|1722]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motoki]] , a court noble (* [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1820|1820]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Uragami Gyokudō|Urakami Gyokudō]] , a painter of literary style (* [[:en:1745|1745]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1161|en|1161|WD=Q19664|lt=1161}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|WD=Q2890|lt=September 24}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1702|en|1702|WD=Q6819|lt=1702}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayū|en|Yokoi Yayū|WD=Q3572466|lt=Yokoi Yayuu}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|WD=Q1145798|lt=Kanpo}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1742|en|1742|WD=Q7575|lt=1742}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|WD=Q2932|lt=October 2}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|en|1805|WD=Q6898|lt=1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1715|en|1715|WD=Q6884|lt=1715}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motoki}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1820|en|1820|WD=Q6973|lt=1820}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ） – {{ill|Uragami Gyokudō|en|Uragami Gyokudō|WD=Q737819|lt=Urakami Gyokudō}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|en|1745|WD=Q7586|lt=1745}} ).
== See Also ==

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初四]][[zh:九月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初四]][[zh:九月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初四]][[zh:九月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 4|qq=September 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1161|en|1161|WD=Q19664|lt=1161}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|WD=Q2890|lt=September 24}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1702|en|1702|WD=Q6819|lt=1702}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayū|en|Yokoi Yayū|WD=Q3572466|lt=Yokoi Yayuu}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|WD=Q1145798|lt=Kanpo}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1742|en|1742|WD=Q7575|lt=1742}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|WD=Q2932|lt=October 2}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|en|1805|WD=Q6898|lt=1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1715|en|1715|WD=Q6884|lt=1715}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motoki}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1820|en|1820|WD=Q6973|lt=1820}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ） – {{ill|Uragami Gyokudō|en|Uragami Gyokudō|WD=Q737819|lt=Urakami Gyokudō}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|en|1745|WD=Q7586|lt=1745}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|3|9|5|8|4|10|9|0904|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初四|qq=}} {{zh:九月初四|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō|1=Ōhō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1161|en|1161|WD=Q19664|lt=1161|1=1161}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|WD=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}} ） – Due to a smallpox outbreak, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō|1=Ōhō}} . == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1702|en|1702|WD=Q6819|lt=1702|1=1702}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24|1=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Yokoi Yayū|en|Yokoi Yayū|WD=Q3572466|lt=Yokoi Yayuu|1=Yokoi Yayū}} , a haiku poet († {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}} ). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|WD=Q1145798|lt=Kanpo|1=Kanpō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1742|en|1742|WD=Q7575|lt=1742|1=1742}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|WD=Q2932|lt=October 2|1=October 2}} ） – {{ill|Arakida Tsunemasa|ja|荒木田経雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arakida Tsunemasa|1=Arakida Tsunetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q98117566}} , a kokugakusha († {{ill|1805|en|1805|WD=Q6898|lt=1805|1=1805}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)|1=正德}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1715|en|1715|WD=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|WD=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}} ） – {{ill|Koyama Ryōshi|ja|小山良師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Ryōshi|1=Oyama Yoshimoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459976}} , an officer (ashigarutō) of the Akō Domain (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648|1=1648}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motoki|1=Konoe Motohiro}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648|1=1648}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1820|en|1820|WD=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}} ） – {{ill|Uragami Gyokudō|en|Uragami Gyokudō|WD=Q737819|lt=Urakami Gyokudō|1=Uragami Gyokudō}} , a painter of literary style (* {{ill|1745|en|1745|WD=Q7586|lt=1745|1=1745}} ).
